title: run.bats: check that we can run with symlinks in the bundle path
body: Make sure that we don't trigger error messages in `runc` when `$TMPDIR`, which affects `os.TempDir()` (which is the default for `ioutil.TempDir()`), is itself a symbolic link.  Tests #745.

comments.body: LGTM.  @mheon will probably want to revendor Podman after this goes in.
